commit.subject: LU-10391 lnet: change lnet_notify() to take struct lnet_nid
commit.message:
LU-10391 lnet: change lnet_notify() to take struct lnet_nid

lnet_notify() now takes a 'struct lnet_nid *' instead of a
lnet_nid_t.
